---
title: "Q8 — Mini-cakes: P(mean > 150)"
author: "Upayan Mazumder"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Q8
mu <- 145; sigma <- 9; n <- 12
se <- sigma/sqrt(n)
z <- (150 - mu)/se
p_value <- 1 - pnorm(z)
z; p_value

xs <- seq(-4,4,length=400); ys <- dnorm(xs)
plot(xs, ys, type='l', main='Q8: P(mean > 150)', ylab='Density')
abline(v=z, col='red')
polygon(c(z, xs[xs>z], max(xs)), c(0, ys[xs>z], 0), col=rgb(1,0,0,0.3))
```
